mapper.select: SELECT er.*, e.exam_name, s.real_name as student_name, s.student_no, c.class_name FROM exam_record er LEFT JOIN exam e ON er.exam_id = e.exam_id LEFT JOIN student s ON er.student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.class_id WHERE er.record_id = #{recordId}

SELECT er.*, e.exam_name, s.real_name as student_name, s.student_no, c.class_name FROM exam_record er LEFT JOIN exam e ON er.exam_id = e.exam_id LEFT JOIN student s ON er.student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.class_id WHERE er.exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY er.total_score DESC

SELECT er.*, e.exam_name, s.real_name as student_name, s.student_no, c.class_name FROM exam_record er LEFT JOIN exam e ON er.exam_id = e.exam_id LEFT JOIN student s ON er.student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.class_id ORDER BY er.submit_time DESC

SELECT er.*, e.exam_name, s.real_name as student_name, s.student_no, c.class_name FROM exam_record er LEFT JOIN exam e ON er.exam_id = e.exam_id LEFT JOIN student s ON er.student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.class_id WHERE er.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY er.submit_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = 2
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(total_score), 0) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
SELECT COALESCE(MIN(total_score), 0) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = 2
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(total_score), 0) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = 2
SELECT COALESCE( COUNT(CASE WHEN total_score >= #{passScore} THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0 ) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = 2
